---
title: "main.tsx"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\pennyone\vis\main.tsx"
loc: 6
complexity: 1
logic_score: 9.65
style_score: 9.54
intel_score: 8.07
overall_score: 9.08
---

## Intent
The `main.tsx` module is the entry point for the browser-based visualization application. It handles the low-level React DOM mounting process, attaching the `App` component to the physical HTML root and initiating the visual cortex's rendering lifecycle.

## Interaction Protocol
This module is executed by the browser when the visualization URL is accessed. It coordinates the initial render pass and ensures the application is correctly initialized within the client's environment.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 9.5/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 9 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://react)
- [*](file://react-dom/client)
- [App](file://./App.ts)

### Exports
Internal logic only.
